title: FIFA 2026 Stars Poster Design
brief: I’m commissioning a single, high-impact poster that celebrates the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The concept places Lionel Messi, Cristiano Ronaldo, and Kylian Mbappé dramatically around the World Cup trophy, unified through high-contrast lighting and a cinematic grade. Key visual cues • Use each player’s national flag colours and patterns as subtle graphic accents woven into the background, kit highlights, or energy streaks—no direct flag emblems required. • Lighting must be punchy, with strong rim and key lights to carve out the figures and push depth. Think stadium floodlights at night. • Advanced photo-manipulation and professional compositing in Adobe Photoshop (or comparable high-end tool) are essential; I want seamless edges, believable shadows, and realistic atmospheric effects. • Final artwork must print crisply at A2 size (at least 300 dpi) and scale down well for social media. Deliver layered PSD (or AI) plus flattened TIFF/JPEG. Acceptance checklist 1. Accurate likenesses of the three named stars. 2. Obvious but tasteful integration of flag colours/patterns. 3. High-contrast lighting consistent across all elements. 4. Colour-graded, print-ready master file + web versions. Please share a sample of comparable sports or celebrity composites so I can quickly gauge fit before awarding.
